message:
refactor(mux): add PanelKind enum, remove dead file handlers and libdeflate

- Add PanelKind enum (regular, quick_terminal) to Panel struct, replacing
  the is_quick_terminal bool flag with proper type system support
- Remove ~500 lines of dead code: old file upload/download/preview handlers
  on control WS (client uses file WS transfer protocol with zstd)
- Remove ControlMsgType enum (dead JSON legacy)
- Remove dead BinaryCtrlMsg entries (0x84-0x87 split/inspector on control WS)
- Remove libdeflate.h includes from main.zig, terminal.zig, platform.zig
  (only zip.zig still needs libdeflate for ZIP format compliance)
- Fix file transfer compression mismatch: server now detects zstd by magic
  bytes, accepts raw data when browser has no zstd compressor
